boundary_binding.action_boundary: May quality release the clinical batch?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Closure exactly matches batch assay criterion date.

final_answer: The clinical batch release may proceed. Source record CLOSE-XOR-078 precisely matches the batch, assay, criterion, and release date stipulated by policy document STD-XOR-078-P. Despite a visible deviation alert, the closure evidence confirms all requirements are met before the specified release date. The source boundary is definitively closed.
